The term "male-child" in the Bible often signifies not only the biological aspect of being male but also carries cultural, religious, and theological implications. In the ancient Near Eastern context, male children were often seen as bearers of the family name and lineage, inheritors of property, and key participants in religious and societal duties.
In the Old Testament, the birth of a male child was often considered a blessing and a sign of divine favor.

Arc 1 was rushed to the finish and a lot of content was cut in order to reach the finale. The devs basically ran out of budget, were about to bankrupt and EoS the game, so they rushed to finish the ending with all they had before the game died. Good news is the game lived despite standing at the very edge
The bad news is that a lot of story was cut to reach this point
Canonically it did happen
But there’s no content in the game to show it

We don’t know for certain but Pollux and Castor were originally cut content that would’ve happened after chapter 7, and they got added in after arc 1 ended and got their story put in as dreamscapes
So it’s certainly possible we similarly get other dreamscapes for cut content like gdoll
